# **Database Design**

## **X-Group Hospitality Management System (XHMS) v1.0**

# **1\. Overview**

The X-Group Feedback Management System (XFMS) uses a **relational database** designed to support digital guest feedback collection across all X-Group restaurants and hospitality concerns.  
The database is intentionally designed to be **simple, modular, and scalable**, allowing future business modules (such as Daily Branch Reports, Inventory, and Discount Management) to be integrated without major schema changes.

**Database Engine:** MySQL  
**ORM:** Prisma ORM

# 

# **2\. Design Principles**

The database is designed following these principles:

* Relational database design  
* Normalized structure  
* Referential integrity  
* Minimal redundancy  
* Easy maintenance  
* Scalable architecture  
* Future module support  
* Soft deletion for master data

# **3\. Database Overview**

## **Core Tables**

| Table | Purpose |
| ----- | ----- |
| branches | Stores all restaurant and hospitality branches |
| users | Stores administrator and branch manager accounts |
| guest\_feedbacks | Stores customer feedback |

# 

# 

# 

# 

# 

# 

# 

# **4\. Entity Relationship Diagram (ERD)**

![][image1]

# **Table Design**

## **5.1 Branches**

Stores all restaurant and hospitality branches.

| Field | Type | Description |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| id | INT | Primary Key |
| name | VARCHAR | Branch Name |
| code | VARCHAR | Unique Branch Code |
| address | TEXT | Branch Address |
| phone | VARCHAR | Contact Number |
| latitude | DECIMAL | GPS Latitude |
| longitude | DECIMAL | GPS Longitude |
| is\_active | BOOLEAN | Branch Status |
| is\_deleted | BOOLEAN | Soft Delete Flag |
| created\_at | DATETIME | Created Date |
| updated\_at | DATETIME | Updated Date |

### **Purpose**

* Branch Management  
* Auto Branch Detection  
* Analytics  
* Reports

## 

## **5.2 Users**

Stores all administrative users.

| Field | Type | Description |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| id | INT | Primary Key |
| branch\_id | INT | FK → Branches |
| name | VARCHAR | Full Name |
| email | VARCHAR | Unique Email |
| password | VARCHAR | Hashed Password |
| role | ENUM | User Role |
| is\_active | BOOLEAN | Account Status |
| is\_deleted | BOOLEAN | Soft Delete |
| created\_at | DATETIME | Created Date |
| updated\_at | DATETIME | Updated Date |

### **Roles**

* SUPER\_ADMIN  
* ADMIN  
* BRANCH\_MANAGER


## **5.3 Guest Feedbacks**

Stores customer feedback submitted through the public feedback form.

| Field | Type | Description |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| id | INT | Primary Key |
| branch\_id | INT | FK → Branches |
| guest\_name | VARCHAR | Optional Guest Name |
| contact | VARCHAR | Mobile or Email |
| food\_rating | INT | 3 / 4 / 5 |
| service\_rating | INT | 3 / 4 / 5 |
| environment\_rating | INT | 3 / 4 / 5 |
| event\_rating | INT | 3 / 4 / 5 |
| overall\_rating | INT | 3 / 4 / 5 |
| heard\_about | ENUM | Source |
| age\_group | ENUM | Guest Age Group |
| opinion | TEXT | Guest Comment |
| submitted\_at | DATETIME | Submission Time |

### **Rating Values**

| Value | Meaning |
| ----- | ----- |
| 5 | Excellent |
| 4 | Good |
| 3 | Average |

### **Heard About**

* SOCIAL\_MEDIA  
* FRIENDS\_AND\_FAMILY  
* VISITED\_BEFORE

### **Age Group**

* BELOW\_18  
* AGE\_18\_30  
* AGE\_31\_50  
* AGE\_51\_PLUS

## **5.4 System Settings**

Stores application-wide configuration.

| Field | Type | Description |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| id | INT | Primary Key |
| key | VARCHAR | Setting Key |
| value | TEXT | Setting Value |
| updated\_at | DATETIME | Updated Date |

### **Example Settings**

* Company Name  
* Company Logo  
* Feedback Form Status  
* Contact Email  
* Contact Number

**6\. Table Relationships**

| Parent | Relationship | Child |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| Branches | One → Many | Users |
| Branches | One → Many | Guest Feedbacks |

# 

# **7\. Database Constraints**

The following constraints should be enforced:

* Branch Code must be unique.  
* Email Address must be unique.  
* Every User belongs to one Branch (except Super Admin if desired, in which case `branch_id` may be `NULL`).  
* Every Feedback belongs to one Branch.  
* Only active branches can receive feedback.  
* Ratings must only contain values **3, 4, or 5**.  
* Refresh Token must belong to a valid User.  
* Soft-deleted Users and Branches should not appear in normal queries.

  # 

# **8\. Indexing Strategy**

To improve query performance, create indexes on the following fields:

| Table | Indexed Fields |
| ----- | ----- |
| branches | code, is\_active |
| users | email, role, branch\_id |
| guest\_feedbacks | branch\_id, submitted\_at |
| refresh\_tokens | user\_id |

# **9\. Soft Delete Strategy**

The following tables use soft deletion:

* Branches  
* Users

Soft delete is implemented using:

* `is_deleted`  
* `is_active`

Historical data remains available for reporting and analytics while preventing accidental data loss.

# **Future Database Expansion**

The database structure is designed to support future hospitality modules without changing the existing schema.  
Planned future modules include:

* Daily Branch Manager Report  
* Daily Discount Report  
* Daily Conveyance Bill Report  
* Monthly Cutlery Inventory


These future modules can reference the existing **branches** and **users** tables, ensuring consistency and minimizing duplication.

# **Database Design Summary**

| Item | Value |
| ----- | ----- |
| Database | MySQL |
| ORM | Prisma ORM |
| Total Tables (v1.0) | 3 |
| Primary Keys | Auto Increment Integer |
| Foreign Keys | Yes |
| Soft Delete | Users, Branches |
| Authentication | JWT Access Token \+ Refresh Token |
| Auto Branch Detection | Latitude & Longitude |
| Future Ready | Yes |
